relationship_reviewer.decision_note: All 36 records were reviewed as deliberate C-level curatorial comparisons; there are no A/B claims, causal wording, self-relations, inverse duplicates, or algorithmic/all-pairs generation.

source_reviewer.decision_note: Each comparison binds two selected-batch official object IDs, exact raw locators and snapshot hashes; Shen Zhou attribution, Cassatt printer credit, Ravi Varma posthumous association, undated fields, and broad dates remain explicit.
